summary: Iteration 41: Tested new 'Vivace Bloom' color palette implementation. All color changes verified working: Primary #E8477C (hot pink), Accent #2EC4B6 (teal), Secondary #F59E0B (amber), Background #FCFCFD (clean white), Text #1A1A2E (dark navy). CSS variables correctly applied via data-admin-theme attribute. Settings API returns new colors. Dashboard shows 5 stat cards with vivid colors, 19 module cards with colorful icons. Public site /sito shows hot pink PRENOTA ORA button, teal accents, 5 loyalty reward tiers with colored borders. Mobile view works correctly for both admin and public pages.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS ===
1. POST /api/auth/login - PASS: Returns access_token for admin@brunomelito.it
2. GET /api/health - PASS: Returns {status: alive}
3. GET /api/settings - PASS: Returns admin_theme with new colors (primary=#E8477C, accent=#2EC4B6)
=== DASHBOARD COLOR PALETTE (Desktop) ===
4. Dashboard page loads - PASS: data-testid='dashboard-page' found
5. CSS variable --admin-primary - PASS: #E8477C correctly applied
6. CSS variable --admin-accent - PASS: #2EC4B6 correctly applied
7. CSS variable --admin-content-bg - PASS: #FCFCFD correctly applied
8. CSS variable --admin-content-text - PASS: #1A1A2E correctly applied
9. CSS variable --admin-sidebar-bg - PASS: #FAFBFC correctly applied
10. CSS variable --admin-sidebar-text - PASS: #1A1A2E correctly applied
11. Stat cards - PASS: 5 stat cards with card-lift-enhanced class and vivid colors
12. Module cards - PASS: 19 module cards with colorful icons
13. New Appointment button - PASS: Hot pink gradient (from-[#E8477C] to-[#D03367])
14. Sidebar navigation - PASS: 21 links with sidebar-nav-link class
15. Greeting animation - PASS: greeting-in class present
16. Stats stagger animation - PASS: stagger-in class present
17. Modules stagger animation - PASS: stagger-fast class present
18. No console errors - PASS
=== PUBLIC SITE /sito (Desktop) ===
19. Public site loads - PASS: data-testid='website-landing' found
20. Hero PRENOTA ORA button - PASS: Hot pink color visible
21. Hero title - PASS: 'BRUNO MELITO HAIR' displayed
22. Loyalty section - PASS: 5 reward tiers with colored borders (amber, rose, teal, violet, sky)
23. Promotions section - PASS: Promo cards with colorful borders
24. Contact section - PASS: Pink PRENOTA ORA, green WHATSAPP, pink CHIAMA buttons
=== MOBILE VIEW ===
25. Mobile dashboard loads - PASS: data-testid='dashboard-page' found
26. Mobile menu button - PASS: data-testid='mobile-menu-btn' found
27. Mobile menu opens - PASS: Sidebar sheet with all nav links
28. Mobile stat cards - PASS: 5 stat cards visible
29. Mobile module cards - PASS: 19 module cards visible
30. Mobile public site - PASS: PRENOTA ORA button with hot pink color
31. Mobile loyalty section - PASS: 5 reward tiers visible
critical_code_review_comments: index.css: Root CSS variables updated correctly with new palette (lines 7-48). Override selectors support both old (#C8617A) and new (#E8477C) hex values for backward compatibility.
Layout.jsx: Default admin theme correctly set to new colors. Migration logic removes old theme from localStorage if primary=#C8617A.
Dashboard.jsx: All hardcoded colors updated - stat cards use vivid gradients (#E8477C, #2EC4B6, #F59E0B, #3B82F6, #8B5CF6), MODULES array has colorful from/to gradients.
WebsitePage.jsx: Default theme T colors updated to #E8477C primary, #2EC4B6 accent, #FAFBFD bg, #1A1A2E text.
server.py: Startup migration updates admin_theme in DB for users with old palette to new colors.
Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle (Sheet component) - not blocking functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified new 'Vivace Bloom' color palette. Key colors: Primary #E8477C (hot pink), Accent #2EC4B6 (teal), Secondary #F59E0B (amber), BG #FCFCFD, Text #1A1A2E. CSS override system in index.css supports both old and new hex values. Settings API returns correct admin_theme. Dashboard stat cards have vivid colors, 19 modules have colorful icons. Public site /sito has hot pink PRENOTA ORA button, 5 loyalty tiers with colored borders. Mobile view works correctly.
